description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Schedule the earliest standard AC repair appointment this Saturday between 9–11 AM
tasks.description: Book an air conditioning repair visit for ZIP code 30301 on the nearest upcoming Saturday, choosing the earliest available standard (non-emergency) time slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM and submitting the appointment form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Schedule Service” button in the main header.
On the service type selection page, click the option labeled “Air Conditioning Repair.”
In the ZIP code input field, type “30301” and leave the city/state fields as their default values if present.
Open the date picker and select the nearest upcoming Saturday from today’s date.
In the time-slot selector, choose the earliest available time window that starts at or after 9:00 AM and ends by or before 11:00 AM (for example, “9:00 AM – 10:00 AM” or “9:00 AM – 11:00 AM”).
In the service level section, select “Standard” instead of any options labeled “Emergency,” “After Hours,” or similar.
Fill in the contact form with the following details: name as “Alex Johnson,” phone as “4045557890,” and email as “alex@example.com.”
Click the button labeled “Confirm Appointment” or “Book Now” to submit the AC repair appointment request.

tasks.name: Request a quote for the highest-rated high-efficiency furnace under $3,500
tasks.description: Find high-efficiency furnaces (95%+ AFUE) under $3,500, sort them by customer rating, select the highest-rated option, and submit an installation quote request with full contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Heating Systems” or “Heating” option in the main navigation menu.
On the heating products page, use the category filter and select the checkbox or tab labeled “Furnaces.”
In the efficiency filter section, select “95%+ AFUE” or the highest AFUE range available that is at least 95%.
Locate the price filter and set the maximum price field to “3500” (or select the price range option that caps at $3,500).
Open the sort dropdown and choose the option “Customer Rating – High to Low” or similar.
From the sorted product list, click on the first furnace product card (the highest-rated furnace under $3,500).
On the furnace product detail page, click the button labeled “Request Installation Quote” or “Get a Quote.”

In the quote request form, enter the following: name as “Jordan Smith,” street address as “123 Oak Street,” city as “Atlanta,” ZIP as “30301,” phone as “4045551122,” email as “jordan@example.com,” then click the “Submit Quote Request” button.

tasks.name: Purchase the cheapest annual maintenance plan covering both heating and cooling under $200
tasks.description: Locate maintenance plans that cover both heating and cooling, filter to annual plans, sort by price, choose the cheapest plan priced at or below $200, add it to the cart, and complete the on-site checkout form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Maintenance Plans” link in the main navigation bar or footer menu.
On the maintenance plans page, use the coverage filters and select the option that indicates “Heating & Cooling” or “Whole Home (Heating + Cooling).”
In the billing term dropdown, select “Annual” to show yearly maintenance plans.
Open the sort dropdown and select “Price – Low to High” so the cheapest plans appear first.
From the sorted list, identify the first maintenance plan that shows a yearly price of $200 or less and click its “View Details” or plan name link.
On the plan details page, click the “Add Plan to Cart” or “Enroll Now” button.
Click the cart icon or the “View Cart / Checkout” button and then select “Proceed to Checkout.”

In the checkout form, enter the following information: first name “Taylor,” last name “Green,” address “456 Pine Avenue,” city “Atlanta,” ZIP “30302,” email “taylor@example.com,” phone “4045553344,” and any requested payment fields with sample values (for example, card number “4111111111111111,” expiration “12/28,” CVV “123”), then click the “Place Order” or “Complete Enrollment” button.

tasks.name: Book a duct cleaning service using a promotion with at least 15% discount
tasks.description: Find a special offer related to duct cleaning that offers at least a 15% discount or a promotional price of $250 or less, open its details, and use it to book a duct cleaning appointment by submitting the booking form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Special Offers,” “Coupons,” or “Promotions” link in the main navigation or header.
On the specials page, use the category filters and select the option related to “Indoor Air Quality” or “Duct Services” so duct-related offers are displayed.

Scroll through the list of offers and locate one that mentions “Duct Cleaning” in the title or description and shows either a discount of at least “15% off” or a promotional price of $250 or less; click the “View Offer” or offer title link for the first such promotion you see.
On the duct cleaning offer details page, click the button labeled “Book This Service,” “Schedule with Offer,” or similar.
In the service dropdown or selection field on the booking page, choose “Duct Cleaning” if it is not already selected.
Use the date selector to choose the 15th of next month (relative to today’s date) as the appointment date.
In the time window dropdown, select an afternoon time frame such as “1:00 PM – 4:00 PM.”

Fill in the booking form with name “Morgan Lee,” phone “4045556677,” email “morgan@example.com,” address “789 Maple Drive,” city “Atlanta,” ZIP “30303,” and click the “Schedule Appointment” or “Confirm Booking” button to submit the duct cleaning request with the promotion applied.

tasks.name: Submit an emergency heating service request for tonight after 8:00 PM
tasks.description: Request an emergency heating repair for ZIP code 30309 for the current date, selecting an available emergency time slot that starts at or after 8:00 PM and submitting the emergency service form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main services section or navigation menu, click on “Heating Repair” or “Furnace Repair.”
On the heating repair page, locate and click the “Emergency Service” tab, toggle, or button to switch to emergency booking mode.
In the ZIP code field, type “30309” and leave any pre-filled city/state values unchanged.
Open the date picker and select today’s date as the service date.
In the time-slot dropdown, choose an emergency time window that begins at or after 8:00 PM (for example, “8:00 PM – 10:00 PM” or “8:00 PM – 12:00 AM”).
In the problem description text area, type “No heat, furnace not turning on since this evening.”
Fill in the contact fields with name “Chris Martinez,” phone “4045559900,” and email “chris@example.com.”
Click the “Submit Emergency Request” or “Request Immediate Service” button to send the emergency heating service request.

tasks.name: Schedule installation of a smart thermostat under $250 with Wi‑Fi and 4+ star rating
tasks.description: Search for smart thermostats, filter to Wi‑Fi models under $250 with a rating of at least 4 stars, select the first result, and schedule an installation appointment by completing the booking form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header and type “smart thermostat,” then press Enter or click the search icon.
On the search results page, use the price filter to set the maximum price to “250” so only thermostats priced at $250 or less are shown.
In the feature filters, check the option for “Wi‑Fi Enabled” or “Smart / Connected” to limit results to Wi‑Fi-capable thermostats.
In the rating filter, select “4 stars & up” or the equivalent option to show only products with at least a 4-star rating.
Open the sort dropdown and select “Price – Low to High” so the most affordable qualifying options appear first.
Click on the first thermostat product card in the filtered and sorted list to open its product details page.
On the thermostat product page, click the button labeled “Schedule Installation” or “Book Install.”

In the scheduling form, select a date that is exactly two weeks from today’s date, choose the “10:00 AM – 12:00 PM” time window, enter name “Jamie Parker,” address “321 Birch Lane,” city “Atlanta,” ZIP “30304,” phone “4045552211,” email “jamie@example.com,” and click the “Confirm Installation” or “Book Appointment” button.

tasks.name: Start a financing request for a $5,000 new air conditioner using a 12‑month 0% APR plan
tasks.description: Go to the financing section, locate a financing option that offers 0% APR for at least 12 months, open that plan, and start an application for a $5,000 new air conditioner purchase by submitting the financing form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Financing” or “Payment Options” link in the main navigation menu or footer.

On the financing information page, scroll through the list of plans and identify a plan that shows “0% APR” with a term of at least 12 months; click the “Learn More” or plan name link for the 12‑month 0% APR option.
On the selected financing plan page, click the button labeled “Start Application,” “Apply Now,” or similar.
In the purchase amount field of the application form, type “5000” to indicate a $5,000 purchase.
In the purpose or product dropdown, select “New Air Conditioner” or the closest matching option (such as “New HVAC System”).

Fill out the personal information fields with: name “Riley Thompson,” street address “852 Cedar Street,” city “Atlanta,” ZIP “30305,” phone “4045557788,” email “riley@example.com,” and, if requested, the last 4 digits of SSN as “1234.”
In the preferred contact method dropdown, select “Email” as the contact preference.
Click the “Submit Financing Request” or “Continue Application” button to start the financing process for the $5,000 air conditioner purchase.

tasks.name: Request a consultation for an indoor air quality service recommended in an article
tasks.description: Find a blog article about improving indoor air quality, follow the link to the recommended service (such as air purifier or UV air cleaner installation), and submit a consultation request form specifying a preferred date and afternoon time slot.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Blog,” “Resources,” or “Learning Center” link in the main navigation.
In the blog search field or category filter, type “indoor air quality” and run the search or apply the filter.
From the list of blog posts, click the first article whose title includes the phrase “indoor air quality.”

Scroll through the article until you find a section that recommends a specific service such as “air purifier installation,” “UV air cleaner,” or “air filtration upgrade,” and click the embedded link or button labeled “Learn about [service]” or similar.
On the related indoor air quality service detail page, click the “Request Consultation,” “Schedule a Consultation,” or equivalent button.
In the consultation request form, use the date picker to select a weekday within the next 7 days from today’s date as your preferred consultation date.
In the time-of-day dropdown, select “Afternoon (12–4 PM)” or the closest option that indicates an afternoon time window.

Fill in the remaining fields with name “Alexis Rivera,” phone “4045555566,” email “alexis@example.com,” and a message stating “Interested in improving indoor air quality for my home,” then click the “Send Request” or “Submit Consultation Request” button.
